name: Devil's Decadence
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt chocolates in a heavy small saucepan over low heat, stirring constantly.
2. Beat eggs until frothy. Add sugar and beat 4-5 minutes or until thick and lemon-colored.
3. In a separate bowl, beat half of the cream and cinnamon until soft peaks form. Fold whipped cream into melted chocolate.
4. Fold chocolate mixture into beaten eggs. Pour into prepared souffle dishes. Place in baking dish and pour 1-inch of hot water into the dish.
5. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30-35 minutes, or until a knife inserted into the center comes out clean. Remove collars.
6. Cool to room temperature. Whip remaining cream and cinnamon.
7. Sprinkle souffle with sifted powdered sugar; serve with Fudge Mocha Sauce and whipped cream.
8. FUDGE MOCHA SAUCE: Combine sugar, cream, butter, chopped chocolates, corn syrup, and coffee crystals in a saucepan. Cook and stir over medium-low heat until smooth and slightly thick. Serve warm. Refrigerate leftover sauce.
